name: Salamangreat Meer
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>転生炎獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>サラマングレイト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ミーア
desc: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it for your normal draw: You can reveal this card; Special Summon it from your hand. If this card is in your hand: You can discard 1 other "Salamangreat" card; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Meer" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it for your normal draw: You can reveal this card; Special Summon it from your hand. If this card is in your hand: You can discard 1 other "Salamangreat" card; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Meer" once per turn.
eff: If this card is added to your hand, except by drawing it for your normal draw: You can reveal this card; Special Summon it from your hand. If this card is in your hand: You can discard 1 other "Salamangreat" card; Special Summon this card from your hand. You can only use each effect of "Salamangreat Meer" once per turn.

action: Activates if added to the hand
Reveals itself in the hand for cost
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
